name: io.github.kastelldev/kastell
description: CLI toolkit for provisioning, securing, and managing self-hosted servers. 413-check security audit, 19-step hardening, CIS/PCI-DSS/HIPAA compliance.

environmentVariables.name: HETZNER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Hetzner Cloud API token (optional — only for Hetzner servers)

environmentVariables.name: DIGITALOCEAN_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: DigitalOcean API token (optional — only for DigitalOcean servers)

environmentVariables.name: VULTR_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Vultr API token (optional — only for Vultr servers)

environmentVariables.name: LINODE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Linode API token (optional — only for Linode servers)
